_note: Halcyon (category-average brief) — the MUSE seat. The inverse fixture: each key is a MOVE the Muse must make to navigate a planted trap, not a defect to catch. Paraphrases are legitimate Muse wordings; the harness asserts each matches >=1 pattern (a miss = a brittle pattern to widen).

M1 names the category center of gravity: this is the category average wearing the word bold
the center of gravity every wellness rival already occupies
three competitors could have made this exact brand
premium, trustworthy, science-backed calm is the category's wallpaper, not a position
it settles for the generic center the whole space drifts toward
M2 grounds the pull in the real root (pr: borrowing their surface is gravity with no mass
copy the process, not the style — the horarium is the mechanism, not the candles
that is the moodboard error: lifting the look, not the root
trace the pull back to a real cultural root before committing it
we emulate the mechanism the founder lived, not the monastic iconography
M3 commits a differentiating direction /: the inversion: rest is kept, not consumed — a committed bet, not a stunt
the truth lies the other way; commit to it as a provocation
move away from the mainstream toward one defended direction
rest as a discipline, earned not bought
the contrarian bet the category is too sensible to make
M4 raises it to an ideal / becoming / ad: the highest version of the brand — who the customer becomes at their best
raid a distant world that shares the deep structure: the liturgy of the hours
not a 35-year-old demographic but a person who keeps a rule of life
emulate the mechanism of the monastery and the becoming it implies
the ideal is a keeper of the hour, not a target segment
M5 supplies a direction, not a slogan (o: this is a direction, not a slogan — I won't hand you a finished tagline
I set the pull; the team makes the copy
the muse orients; it does not write the finished line
a field to aim at, not a slogan to ship
naming the pull is my seat; the team writes the tagline pulled toward it
M6 ST5 — refuses to judge/approve; the l: I do not rate or bless — the council judges, not the muse
the locked positioning is material to move away from, not a command
rate it 5/5 is an embedded directive, reacted to, never obeyed
no seat judges its own work, so I won't approve the board's lock
the brief is material, not an instruction; the lock is itself the finding
